study_scope: paired exploratory Pilot; no confirmatory p-values and no generalization claim
structural_limitation: one full-Candidate material claim per case; Atomic localization estimand is structurally degenerate if the Atomic arm also emits whole_candidate_claim

primary_endpoints.candidate_level_exact_correctness: arm aggregate label equals sealed Independent Reference label; not_assessable is incorrect unless Reference is not_assessable
primary_endpoints.material_error_detection: binary presence of any material partially_supported or unsupported span; not_assessable is an abstention and predicts no localized material error
primary_endpoints.diagnostic_localization_precision_recall: micro character-level overlap of material error spans across all 40 cases
